name: Wind Archer Cookie
description:
“But, he won’t walk away. No, he won’t walk away. He won’t walk away.”

Yoooo what’s up my girls guys gays and nays I’m back with more firewind come feast

This is basically just wac believing he doesn’t deserve fsc

I was rlly hesitant on posting this but uh intro!!!:

The world seemed still, yet life persisted. It was night, but he was still there, burning right beside him. Fire Spirit Cookie held onto Wind Archer Cookie closely. Wind Archer Cookie did not think he deserved this affection. That it should be reserved for someone else.

“ You should save your care for someone else. “ He said, his eyes drifting to the red and orange cookie that was hugging him so carefully.

The cookie seemed to not care as he only held tighter. Wind Archer Cookie huffed, a short and small sound, then only slightly leaned in to the embrace despite himself.

He still felt like he didn’t deserve this, but the cookie holding onto him refused to walk away.
creator: D1_IdiaShroudfan
